title: BaseTDF KAO Test Vector
description: A single conformance test vector for the BaseTDF Key Access Object. Each vector is a self-contained JSON document that any language implementation can load and execute against the BaseTDF-KAO conformance assertions.

id.description: Globally unique kebab-case identifier (e.g., 'pos-rsa-oaep-256-001'). Identifiers are append-only and immutable across spec revisions.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the vector exercises.

conformance.description: One or more conformance assertions exercised by this vector.

category.description: Vector category. 'positive': successful round-trip. 'negative': implementations MUST reject with the documented error. 'legacy': v4.3 backward-compatibility behavior. 'kat': known-answer test pinning a specific cryptographic constant or computation.

algorithm.description: The algorithm under test, or 'mixed' for split vectors that exercise multiple algorithms, or 'n/a' for vectors that test purely structural concerns.

manifestSchemaVersion.description: The TDF manifest schema version this vector targets (e.g., '4.4.0', '4.3.0').

kao.description: The KAO under test. Should validate (or fail to validate, for negative vectors) against schema/BaseTDF/kao.schema.json.

policy.description: Canonical policy form: the Base64-encoded policy JSON exactly as it appears in encryptionInformation.policy in the manifest. Required for any vector that exercises policy-binding verification.

keys.description: References to test keys used by this vector, keyed by role (e.g., 'kas', 'kasEC', 'kasMLKEM'). Each value is the relative path of a key bundle under 'keys/'.

dekShare.description: Hex-encoded DEK share for this KAO. Required for KAT vectors that pin a specific HMAC or HKDF computation; OPTIONAL for positive vectors where the DEK is recovered through the unwrap operation.

shares.description: Hex-encoded DEK shares ordered by KAO position, for split vectors. The full DEK is the XOR of all shares.

fullDek.description: Hex-encoded reconstructed DEK, for split vectors that assert reconstruction success.

outcome.description: Whether a conformant implementation MUST accept or reject the input.

errorCode.description: Required when outcome is 'reject'. One of the error codes in BaseTDF-KAO-CONF §3.

policyBindingValid.description: Whether the policy binding verifies successfully. Independent of outcome (e.g., a KAO can have a valid binding but still be rejected for another reason).

recoveredDek.description: Hex-encoded DEK (or DEK share, for non-split vectors) that a conformant implementation MUST recover. Only meaningful when outcome is 'accept'.

recoveredMetadata.description: JSON object that a conformant implementation MUST recover from encryptedMetadata after successful policy-binding verification.

normalizedKao.description: The KAO after alias resolution to v4.4 canonical form (alg, kas, protectedKey, ephemeralKey, structured policyBinding).
